title: GrowGeneration Reports Record First Quarter 2021 Financial Results and Raises Full-Year 2021 Guidance
text: GrowGeneration Q1 2021 Record Results and Raised Guidance. Q1 2021 Performance: Record first quarter GAAP pre-tax net income of approximately $7.7 million vs $2.1 million pre-tax loss in Q1 2020. Strong revenue growth continued. Cannabis cultivation demand remained robust. Same-store sales growth of 24.4% forecast for full year (vs 63% in 2020). 2021 Revised Guidance: Raised full-year 2021 guidance significantly. Company projecting strong profitability trajectory. Adjusted EBITDA guidance of $31.5-33.5 million. Continued margin expansion expected. Proprietary brands becoming more significant revenue contributor. Company executing well on growth and profitability. Investor confidence reflected in stock performance.
